channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Three Fed signals that could make bitcoin pop
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 17, 2026

item.title: China pays closer attention to stablecoins as cross-border role expands
item.description: A senior PBOC official called for closer monitoring, stronger regulation and international coordination as stablecoins gain importance in global payments.

item.title: Bitcoin is setting up 'meaningful floors' in $60K–$70K range: Analyst
item.description: Bitcoin’s $6000–$70,000 cost-basis cluster hints at a bottom, but a bearish daily flag keeps BTC exposed to a deeper selloff toward $50,000.

item.title: Uniswap Jumps Double Digits as Standard Chartered Eyes $100 UNI by 2030
item.description: The DeFi token is up 20% in a day, with a Standard Chartered note and Uniswap's tokenized-stock launch fueling fresh demand.

item.title: UNI token surges while rest of crypto market looks to Fed's Warsh for guidance
item.description: The Federal Open Markets Committee is set to announce the first interest-rate decision under Fed Chair Kevin Warsh, who then faces questions from journalists.

item.title: Forget retail traders: The real multi-trillion-dollar crypto future is building infrastructure for machines
item.description: While legacy banks keep corporate money idled in slow regional accounts, a new protocol allows software systems to settle multi-currency trade instantly.

item.title: Bitcoin trader warns of 'bearish reaction' to FOMC with $64K now essential
item.description: Bitcoin approached important near-term support on new Fed chair Kevin Warsh's first FOMC day with a $55,000 BTC price target still on the table.

item.title: Hyperliquid's $10B open interest coincides with growth in equity-linked markets: Talos
item.description: Hyperliquid’s $10 billion open interest milestone shows growing demand for onchain equities and commodities trading with 24/7 accessibility, according to Talos.

item.title: House, Senate Strike Deal on Housing Bill With CBDC Ban Through 2030
item.description: A bicameral deal on the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act revives a provision barring the Fed from issuing a digital dollar until 2030.

item.title: BitGo courts crypto firms awaiting MiCA approval amid Binance licensing concerns
item.description: BitGo launches a MiCA-compliant crypto infrastructure platform in Europe as exchanges face pressure to meet July 1 licensing rules across the EU.

item.title: BitGo offers Europe’s crypto firms a MiCA-compliance lifeline as license deadline looms
item.description: BaFin-regulated BitGo says its Crypto-as-a-Service platform can help eligible crypto players across Europe with an alternative way to navigate MiCA.

item.title: Forget the price charts. Here's how bitcoin and S&P 500 look like when adjusted for the money printer
item.description: Valuations shaped by M2 money supply growth paint reveal concerning trends for risk assets.

item.title: Congress reaches deal on housing bill with CBDC ban until 2030
item.description: The US could soon temporarily ban a central bank digital currency, as House and Senate leaders came to a deal on the 21st Century Road to Housing Act.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Strategy’s STRC falls to $91 as investors flinch at latest BTC buying
item.description: “It appears traders are seeing the latest BTC acquisition as an unsustainable path for STRC,” said 10x Research’s Markus Thielen.

item.title: Crypto PAC's $12 million Senate candidate, Barry Moore, wins Alabama GOP primary
item.description: The Trump loyalist drew more crypto dollars than any candidate so far in this year's midterms, and the result marks a big win for the industry's political arm.

item.title: Live markets: Markets turn their focus to the Fed as oil returns to pre-war levels
item.description: Bitcoin's Sharpe ratio hit a level that has marked every cycle low since 2015, but in each case it preceded months of basing rather than an immediate rebound.

item.title: Illinois governor approves crypto transaction tax despite industry uproar
item.description: “There is effectively no comparable state financial transaction tax on stocks, bonds or derivatives anywhere in the country,” said a16z general counsel Miles Jennings.

item.title: XRP gives back breakout gains, slipping below $1.23 on heavy selling
item.description: XRP briefly traded above key resistance before sellers stepped in, with rising volume suggesting traders used the rally to cut positions rather than add risk.

item.title: Uniswap jumps 22% and altcoins rip while bitcoin stalls before the Fed
item.description: UNI surged after Standard Chartered set a $100 long-term target, and HYPE and solana led a broad altcoin bid. Bitcoin held near $66,000 as oil fell to a three-month low and the Fed met for the first time under Kevin Warsh.

item.title: Hyperliquid open interest surges 32% in week: Is $80 HYPE next?
item.description: Despite mixed HYPE derivatives market signals, Hyperliquid’s explosive TradFi perpetual growth makes a push toward $80 increasingly realistic.

item.title: 🚨NEW: Trump-endorsed and crypto-backed @RepBarryMoore has won the GOP primary runoff for Alabama’s open Senate seat, defeating @JaredHudson_AL. Fairshake spent more than $12 million in the race and provided the following statement after the vi - x.com

item.title: Senators urge Treasury to ensure state authority in GENIUS application
item.description: A bipartisan group of US senators told the Treasury that its application of stablecoin laws should be done in a way that “preserves and promotes State participation.”

item.title: This is one of the most anti-crypto laws in the U.S. It taxes the exchange, transfer, or storage of digital assets—you buy BTC, you pay a tax; you hold your BTC on Coinbase, you pay a tax; and so on. There is effectively no comparable state financial transaction t - x.com

item.title: Alibaba Is Building Qwen-Robot: The Operating System for the Robot Economy
item.description: The Chinese company is doubling down on its "embodied AI" bet.

item.title: Bitcoin tops $67K following US-Iran peace deal: Is it a bull trap?
item.description: Despite Bitcoin derivatives data highlight traders’ skepticism even though BTC briefly rallied above $67,000. Are bulls stepping into a trap?

item.title: CZ Praises Hyperliquid but Says He Would Never Operate It the Same Way Binance founder CZ praised Hyperliquid in an upcoming Galaxy Brains podcast, calling its innovation “actually awesome.” He said Hyperliquid occupies a niche that Binance cannot c - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1TSXFmZExqNm9oeUQ4VktfZjJ1Vkh0NmUwaXVUU19SSy1uUHdQQmhRTlZ0ZzY3LUpjUEVEMDRBMnNWUFd0dkYxZTRfRnlYT2dQYjc5Rkl6SzJMMWJiNWhDOGZFNA?oc=5" target="_blank">CZ Praises Hyperliquid but Says …

item.title: Here is why Strategy's dividend-paying crypto stock is crashing to near-historic lows
item.description: Strategy's bitcoin-backed preferred stock remains well below par value as concerns over dividend coverage and stronger competition from Strive's SATA.

item.title: Illinois Governor Pritzker just signed the most punitive digital asset tax in the country into law. This will create an unprecedented tax regime that disproportionately burdens Illinois residents for simply using digital assets and will drive innovation and builders out - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBHYkNNenNyS0tRNDA3OVF6T3ZHQTQ0MUlKSjJ5V2RRenc2cTVUUUhoUzhySTBmRVhnSFpxSjdlTnZ6RjRGZ2I3Tzh6RDQ1bEgwNG1Hd3dBb1hCem9ZNGZCRGNSYWRxZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Illinois Governor Pritzker j…

item.title: We started as a place to buy Bitcoin, now we power your entire financial life. Here’s everything we announced today ↓ → Tokenized Stocks → Pre-IPO Perps → Stock options → Crypto options → Perpetual-style equity indices → Crypto derivatives, back in Am - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin miners' AI pivot faces $50 billion reality check, says VanEck
item.description: VanEck says investors are shifting focus from contract announcements to execution risk as miners chase AI revenue.

item.title: Tokenized asset market tops $43B as institutions accelerate blockchain adoption
item.description: Tokenized financial assets have surged 37% in six months as institutions expand blockchain adoption and the market broadens beyond funds and private credit, according to Token Terminal.

item.title: U.S. senators urge Treasury not to leave states out of GENIUS Act stablecoin process
item.description: Senators led by Republican Cynthia Lummis are insisting the Treasury Department ensure states get a process to prove their ability to supervise stablecoins.

item.title: Crypto Exchange Binance Will Be Rejected for EU Regulatory License: Reuters
item.description: Binance said it believes it is compliant as a regulatory deadline in the European Union nears—and a report says it's likely to lose access.

item.title: Hyperliquid, Uniswap and Worldcoin buck crypto slump as traders chase AI, DeFi trends
item.description: A handful of tokens continued their run while bitcoin and the rest of the crypto market stalled after the early week bounce.

item.title: ChatGPT Is Still Huge, But Rival AI Chatbots Are Catching Up Fast
item.description: Sensor Tower's State of AI 2026 report shows ChatGPT's audience share slipping below 50% for the first time, as Gemini's default-app advantage and Claude's Pentagon-fueled rally eat into OpenAI's lead.

item.title: Bitcoin metric near ‘low-risk’ zone after holders absorb 125K BTC in June: Time for a rebound?
item.description: Bitcoin’s Sharpe ratio and a 125,000 BTC increase in BTC accumulator demand mark the start of a new demand phase. Will prices follow?

item.title: FBI Says It Foiled Drone Attack Plot Targeting White House UFC Event
item.description: Federal prosecutors allege five men planned to use explosive-laden drones and sniper teams to take out "high-value targets" at the UFC event.

item.title: Crypto PAC has $12M stake in Senate primary runoff as Alabama voters head to polls
item.description: Defend American Jobs reported spending $7.4 million on media to support Republican Barry Moore ahead of his May 20 Alabama primary, and an additional $4.7 million before Tuesday’s runoffs.

item.title: Coinbase lets users transfer stock portfolios as exchange expands beyond crypto
item.description: The crypto exchange is deepening its push into traditional finance by enabling ACATS stock transfers and expanding trading products beyond digital assets.

item.title: Coinbase Gears Up to Launch Tokenized Stock Trading, Crypto and Equities Options
item.description: Publicly traded crypto exchange Coinbase added to its feature set Tuesday as it seeks to become the "everything exchange."

item.title: Coinbase introduces AI adviser, stock options, and pre-IPO markets in finance push
item.description: The crypto exchange is expanding into investing, derivatives and banking services as it pursues an all-in-one financial platform.

item.title: XRP whale wallet withdrawals top 720M as risk-adjusted return data points to opportunity
item.description: Whales pulled more than 720 million XRP from exchanges, as various data points converge to predict a potential 50% rally.

item.title: Japan Rates Hit Three-Decade High, But No ‘Meaningful Disruption’ to Crypto Market
item.description: Japan's central bank lifted rates to a level unseen in decades, a move that once shook crypto markets—yet prices barely stirred.

item.title: Bitcoin has already won as Digital Capital. The next wave is Digital Credit, Digital Money, Digital Yield, and Bitcoin-backed capital markets — products that can bring trillions of dollars of traditional credit and money market capital onto Bitcoin. My interview with - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5qUUJsUXdxaVhsVTljWGxIUzJPTEpYY2JyX2hlYzZUdzdydURJT0tlczh3Z3M0SDJzenVFMEZ1YkIta0cwSlNJT0FZSTJvdUxRYnctRWpXV0p2bms?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin has already won as Digital Capital.…

item.title: State Street launches GENIUS Act-aligned money market fund for stablecoin reserves
item.description: The launch comes amid growing competition among financial institutions to manage assets backing dollar-pegged stablecoins.

item.title: Ripple targets Africa’s booming remittance market with Flutterwave investment
item.description: Ripple’s investment in Flutterwave will bring RLUSD, Ripple Payments and XRPL to one of Africa’s largest fintechs as blockchain remittances gain traction.

item.title: SpaceX Shares Hit New High as Elon Musk's Firm Agrees to Acquire AI Startup Cursor for $60 Billion
item.description: The all-stock deal would make Cursor a wholly owned SpaceX subsidiary and deepen the company's push into AI following its blockbuster IPO.

item.title: 7 Ways Businesses Are Using Crypto Swap APIs
item.description: Real-world case studies show how the best crypto swap APIs help wallets, aggregators, and protocols improve onboarding and retention.

item.title: Why US-regulated Bitcoin perpetuals could change crypto trading
item.description: US-regulated Bitcoin perpetual futures could give retail and institutional traders new ways to access crypto derivatives.

item.title: JUST IN: Elon Musk is now worth more than Bitcoin's entire market cap. Elon Musk: $1.4 trillion Bitcoin: $1.3 trillion - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE95cUh4RXV0SGtZU0p2ZHJDMjczQk5RZGd4TFBNRnN0M0hxLXNjUXJuYVR3dXlDRGFJaGZFRUxrZEZXQmZ5THNwSjNmY0xKQm1hRmw5VlBjWW9nYVRickw1WmJB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Elon Musk is now worth mo…

item.title: OFAC and Crypto Crime: Every OFAC Specially Designated National with Identified Cryptocurrency Addresses
item.description: As far back as the early 1800s, the U.S. Department of the Treasury has issued economic sanctions to achieve foreign… The post OFAC and Crypto Crime: Every OFAC Specially Designated National with Identified Cryptocurrency Addresses appeare…

item.title: That's the incoming test for #Bitcoin and it will decide everything in terms of direction for the coming period. If Bitcoin fails to hold above $64,000, we'll be testing new lows. If it does hold above $64,000, I assume we'll be seeing $74-79,000 as the next target zo - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBIRXNtblRPVVE4aE9tQVBCTWtTM1JMaktNTUZHc3pmNW81WmlSY1BqaFVDVmlscjVieUMzcm44T2hEYmFmQUZjUjlrdDRobEl2bW1tX29ZVE8zbmVqdnVHRUpXdw?oc=5" target="_blank">That's the incoming test for #Bi…

item.title: Ripple invests in Flutterwave, pushing its stablecoin and XRP Ledger into payments across Africa
item.description: The deal values Flutterwave at $3.2 billion, and will integrate Ripple's RLUSD and the XRP Ledger network to speed cross-border payments across Africa.

item.title: Robinhood Trims Headcount by 10% Amid Crypto Revenue Crunch
item.description: Robinhood is letting go of 10% of its employees, attempting to streamline operations amid a downturn in crypto-related revenue.

item.title: Coinbase to join tokenized stock race with onchain shares, dividend payments
item.description: The crypto exchange said investors will own the shares and receive dividends, underscoring growing momentum behind tokenized securities.

item.title: Binance says its European regulatory application is compliant despite report of Greek rejection
item.description: An EU crypto license application by the world’s largest crypto exchange is set to be rejected by the Greek regulator HCMC, according to a report from Reuters.

item.title: Ethereum’s biggest protocol overhaul in years moves into its final development stage
item.description: Developers are entering the final stretch of work on Glamsterdam, the network's next major upgrade, as teams begin testing a version of the fork in a closed environment.

item.title: State Street targets stablecoin reserve boom with new money market fund
item.description: The asset manager joins BlackRock, Franklin Templeton and others competing to manage reserves backing the growing stablecoin market.

item.title: BREAKING: Binance Risks Losing EU Access as Greece MiCA Bid Faces Rejection Reuters reported that Binance, the world’s largest crypto exchange, is set to lose permission to serve EU clients within weeks as its MiCA license application in Greece is expe - x.com
